data.name: Psychic Whorl
data.oracle_text: Target opponent discards two cards. Then if you control a Rat, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

data.name: Quaketusk Boar
data.oracle_text: Reach, trample, haste
data.flavor_text:
"Calamity Beasts are running through Valley, leaving death and destruction in their wake. I have a plan to stop them."
—Glarb, ruler of Fountainport

data.name: Rabbit Response
data.oracle_text: Creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn. If you control a Rabbit, scry 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)
data.flavor_text: You never fight just one rabbitfolk. They bring the strength of their burrow to battle with them.

data.name: Rabid Bite
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.
data.flavor_text: A healthy felidar is voracious yet regal. A rabid felidar is nothing more than appetite lashed to frothing jaws.

data.name: Rabid Gnaw
data.oracle_text: Target creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Then it deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.
data.flavor_text: Unbeknownst to the hosts, the foraged seeds they served at dinner had been touched by a Calamity Beast. The results were ... disturbing.

data.name: Raccoon Rallier
data.oracle_text: {T}: Target creature you control gains haste until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.
data.flavor_text: "I used to play for family only until I realized I could inspire an entire party with a single note."

data.name: Ral, Crackling Wit
data.oracle_text:
Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, put a loyalty counter on Ral.
+1: Create a 1/1 blue and red Otter creature token with prowess.
−3: Draw three cards, then discard two cards.
−10: Draw three cards. You get an emblem with "Instant and sorcery spells you cast have storm." (Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.)

data.name: Ravine Raider
data.oracle_text:
Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
{1}{B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: The path to the Cliff of Heroes is rife with bandits, expertly camouflaged in the dense flora of Valley.

data.name: Repel Calamity
data.oracle_text: Destroy target creature with power or toughness 4 or greater.
data.flavor_text: The living seasons come to grow, to burn, to wither, and to freeze. As natural as it is for the Calamity Beasts to live, it is just as natural for them to die.

data.name: Reptilian Recruiter
data.oracle_text:
Trample
When this creature enters, choose target creature. If that creature's power is 2 or less or if you control another Lizard, gain control of that creature until end of turn, untap it, and it gains haste until end of turn.

data.name: Rockface Village
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {R}. Spend this mana only to cast a creature spell.
{R}, {T}: Target Lizard, Mouse, Otter, or Raccoon you control gets +1/+0 and gains haste until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

data.name: Rottenmouth Viper
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice any number of nonland permanents. This spell costs {1} less to cast for each permanent sacrificed this way.
Whenever this creature enters or attacks, put a blight counter on it. Then for each blight counter on it, each opponent loses 4 life unless that player sacrifices a nonland permanent of their choice or discards a card.

data.name: Roughshod Duo
data.oracle_text:
Trample
Whenever you expend 4, target creature you control gets +1/+1 and gains trample until end of turn. (You expend 4 as you spend your fourth total mana to cast spells during a turn.)
data.flavor_text: "En garde, you inadequate excuse for a foe!" challenged the mouse. "Raaahrgh grrrr raaaargh!" agreed the raccoon.

data.name: Run Away Together
data.oracle_text: Choose two target creatures controlled by different players. Return those creatures to their owners' hands.
data.flavor_text: Nobody bothered to look for Libo and Pulla, because everyone knew they didn't want to be found.

data.name: Rust-Shield Rampager
data.oracle_text:
Offspring {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell. If you do, when this creature enters, create a 1/1 token copy of it.)
This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

data.name: Ruthless Negotiation
data.oracle_text:
Target opponent exiles a card from their hand. If this spell was cast from a graveyard, draw a card.
Flashback {4}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
data.flavor_text: "Next time you come this way, do us both a favor and have something worth stealing, yeah?"

data.name: Salvation Swan
data.oracle_text:
Flash
Flying
Whenever this creature or another Bird you control enters, exile up to one target creature you control without flying. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a flying counter on it at the beginning of the next end step.

data.name: Savor
data.oracle_text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Create a Food token. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")
data.flavor_text: Edibility is in the eye of the beholder.

data.name: Sazacap's Brew
data.oracle_text:
Gift a tapped Fish (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they create a tapped 1/1 blue Fish creature token before its other effects.)
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Target player draws two cards. If the gift was promised, target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

data.name: Scales of Shale
data.oracle_text:
Affinity for Lizards (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each Lizard you control.)
Target creature gets +2/+0 and gains lifelink and indestructible until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Like shedding, but backwards.

(Gain the next level as a sorcery to add its ability.)
Whenever one or more creatures you control die, create a Food token. This ability triggers only once each turn.
{1}{B}: Level 2
Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, target player mills two cards.
{2}{B}: Level 3
At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice three other nonland permanents. If you do, return a creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.

Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, when it enters, they draw a card.)
Reach
When this creature enters, if the gift was promised, destroy target artifact or enchantment an opponent controls.

data.name: Seasoned Warrenguard
data.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks while you control a token, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Never underestimate what a rabbit can do with a root vegetable and some moxie.

data.name: Season of Gathering
data.oracle_text:
Choose up to five {P} worth of modes. You may choose the same mode more than once.
{P} — Put a +1/+1 counter on a creature you control. It gains vigilance and trample until end of turn.
{P}{P} — Choose artifact or enchantment. Destroy all permanents of the chosen type.
{P}{P}{P} — Draw cards equal to the greatest power among creatures you control.

data.name: Season of Loss
data.oracle_text:
Choose up to five {P} worth of modes. You may choose the same mode more than once.
{P} — Each player sacrifices a creature of their choice.
{P}{P} — Draw a card for each creature that died under your control this turn.
{P}{P}{P} — Each opponent loses X life, where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

data.name: Season of the Bold
data.oracle_text:
Choose up to five {P} worth of modes. You may choose the same mode more than once.
{P} — Create a tapped Treasure token.
{P}{P} — Exile the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play them.
{P}{P}{P} — Until the end of your next turn, whenever you cast a spell, Season of the Bold deals 2 damage to up to one target creature.

data.name: Season of the Burrow
data.oracle_text:
Choose up to five {P} worth of modes. You may choose the same mode more than once.
{P} — Create a 1/1 white Rabbit creature token.
{P}{P} — Exile target nonland permanent. Its controller draws a card.
{P}{P}{P} — Return target permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with an indestructible counter on it.

data.name: Season of Weaving
data.oracle_text:
Choose up to five {P} worth of modes. You may choose the same mode more than once.
{P} — Draw a card.
{P}{P} — Choose an artifact or creature you control. Create a token that's a copy of it.
{P}{P}{P} — Return each nonland, nontoken permanent to its owner's hand.

Vigilance, haste
Valiant — Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
data.flavor_text: "Your riposte is good, yes. But how's your footwork?"

data.name: Seedpod Squire
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, target creature you control without flying gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text:
"If you think he's loud now, wait until he starts the battle song."

data.name: Serra Redeemer

Flying
Whenever another creature you control with power 2 or less enters, put two +1/+1 counters on that creature.
data.flavor_text: "Heroism is neither a strong arm nor a divine destiny. It is the choice to stand unbowed against impossible odds."

data.name: Shoreline Looter
data.oracle_text:
This creature can't be blocked.
Threshold — Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Then discard a card unless there are seven or more cards in your graveyard.
data.flavor_text: A water skimmer's ability to sense danger in the slightest ripple makes them a prized companion for Long River trawlers.

Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has vigilance and reach.

data.flavor_text: Take heart. Take aim. Take them down.

data.name: Shrike Force
data.oracle_text: Flying, double strike, vigilance
data.flavor_text:

At the beginning of combat on your turn, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
{T}, Pay 2 life, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw two cards. Activate only as a sorcery.

Flying

data.flavor_text: The escape route of many a birdfolk thief has been less surefire than they'd thought.

data.name: Wax-Wane Witness
data.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
Whenever you gain or lose life during your turn, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Batfolk clerics consider the cycle of light and darkness as a sacred allegory of life and death.

data.name: Wear Down
data.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Destroy target artifact or enchantment. If the gift was promised, instead destroy two target artifacts and/or enchantments.
data.flavor_text: The birdfolk guards flitted angrily. "Seriously, Timbles? Again?!"

data.name: Whiskerquill Scribe
data.oracle_text: Valiant — Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.
data.flavor_text:
"Unneeded words are like dandelion seeds—cast adrift at the slightest whiff of scrutiny, only to find purchase and thrive where you least expect."
—Myrtle, Valley scribe

data.name: Whiskervale Forerunner
data.oracle_text: Valiant — Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability you control for the first time each turn, look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card with mana value 3 or less from among them. You may put it onto the battlefield if it's your turn. If you don't put it onto the battlefield, put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

data.name: Wick's Patrol
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, mill three cards. When you do, target creature an opponent controls gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the greatest mana value among cards in your graveyard.
data.flavor_text:
"What a hideous creature! And the worm's no looker either."
—Grumble, rival marshstalker

data.name: Wick, the Whorled Mind
data.oracle_text:
Whenever Wick or another Rat you control enters, create a 1/1 black Snail creature token if you don't control a Snail. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on a Snail you control.
{U}{B}{R}, Sacrifice a Snail: Wick deals damage equal to the sacrificed creature's power to each opponent. Then draw cards equal to the sacrificed creature's power.

data.name: Wildfire Howl
data.oracle_text:
Gift a card (You may promise an opponent a gift as you cast this spell. If you do, they draw a card before its other effects.)
Wildfire Howl deals 2 damage to each creature. If the gift was promised, instead Wildfire Howl deals 1 damage to any target and 2 damage to each creature.

data.name: Wishing Well
data.oracle_text: {T}: Put a coin counter on this artifact. When you do, you may cast target instant or sorcery card with mana value equal to the number of coin counters on this artifact from your graveyard without paying its mana cost. If that spell would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead. Activate only as a sorcery.

data.name: Ygra, Eater of All
data.oracle_text:
Ward—Sacrifice a Food.
Other creatures are Food artifacts in addition to their other types and have "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this permanent: You gain 3 life."
Whenever a Food is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, put two +1/+1 counters on Ygra.

data.name: Zoraline, Cosmos Caller
data.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
Whenever a Bat you control attacks, you gain 1 life.
Whenever Zoraline enters or attacks, you may pay {W}{B} and 2 life. When you do, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.
